title: Cycle Contract Manifest
description: Single source of truth per overnight cycle. Mirrors architect.contract_manifest_schema.json_shape from architect-spec-20260426-090235.json. Written by the orchestrator at end of Step 2c (PM Triage) and again at end of Step 3 (after pipeline IDs are known). Read by the contract-aware hooks (pretool-subagent-enforce, posttool-subagent-track, posttool-overnight-file-check) and check-overnight-reports.py.

spec_id.description: Stable identifier for the spec driving this cycle (e.g. 'spec-20260426-090235' or 'autonomous-<sid>').

monolith_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the monolithic spec file at cycle creation time, or null when no monolith exists (autonomous mode).

mode.description: Sub-mode keyword expected to appear in the Agent prompt (PLAN | TRIAGE | RETRO | DESIGN_MODE | AUDIT_MODE | UI_MODE | null).

pipelines.description: Per-pipeline tracking. Object keyed by pipeline_id (per BA spec) OR array of pipeline records (per architect schema). Both forms are accepted.

specialist_selection.description: Per-specialist scheduling decision. Object form keyed by specialist name OR array form (architect schema). Both accepted.

self_repair.description: T2.4 (BUG-B-Q0E-CONTRACT-SELF-REPAIR-GAP): optional contract-driven, audited grant that lets the cycle's dev role write to a narrow set of /root/.claude/* paths during an active overnight cycle. The object's absence (default) means self-repair is DISABLED and all existing hard blocks in pretool-overnight-hook-guard.py remain in force. When present and enabled, pretool-overnight-hook-guard.py allows the write iff (a) the acting role is in allowed_roles, (b) the realpath target startswith one of allowed_path_prefixes, (c) optional pipeline_id matches the active pipeline, (d) now() < expires_at, AND (e) audit_required is satisfied (audit JSONL append succeeded). Audit log lives at /root/.claude/logs/overnight-self-repair.jsonl. Fail-closed semantics: if any check or the audit append fails, the grant is REVOKED and the existing hard block path runs unchanged.

enabled.description: Master switch. False (or object absent) preserves existing hard blocks.

reason.description: Free-text justification persisted with each audit row for post-mortem review.

allowed_roles.description: Subagent roles whose writes are eligible for the grant. Defaults to dev only.

allowed_path_prefixes.description: Realpath prefixes (boundary-aware) under which writes are permitted. Empty/absent disables grant.

pipeline_id.description: Optional pipeline identifier. When present, the acting subagent's pipeline_id must match exactly.

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC expiry (terminal Z). Grant is REVOKED once now() passes this timestamp.

max_files.description: Soft upper bound on number of audited files for this grant. Enforcement is advisory in v1; future versions may hard-cap.

audit_required.description: When true (default), the JSONL audit append MUST succeed before the write is allowed. When false, the write proceeds even if audit append fails (NOT recommended).
